transcription.text: introducing all with in wash pre treaters to prove how amazing it cleans we set out to find tough stains and every mom knows Little League plays mean major league stains and now all is the official detergent of Little League baseball all combines in wash pre treaters with its active stain lifters to attack tough grass stains for more cleaning power than just washing with the leading value detergent and booster combined give us your worst we'll give it our all
